# ChartForgeX

ChartForgeX is an Evotec project for dependency-free chart rendering in .NET. It creates SVG, PNG, and static HTML visuals for reports, dashboards, documentation, and generated project sites without requiring a JavaScript chart runtime.

## Canonical URLs

- Site: https://chartforgex.evotec.xyz/
- Examples: https://chartforgex.evotec.xyz/examples/
- Documentation: https://chartforgex.evotec.xyz/docs/
- Promoted cases: https://chartforgex.evotec.xyz/examples/promoted-cases.json
- Case schema: https://chartforgex.evotec.xyz/schemas/promoted-cases.schema.json
- Source: https://github.com/EvotecIT/ChartForgeX
- Evotec hub summary: https://evotec.xyz/projects/chartforgex/

## Reproducible Example Model

Promoted cases connect a rendered preview with the shipped HTML, SVG, or PNG artifacts plus the source file or builder method that generated the output. Use `/examples/promoted-cases.json` for structured case data before scraping the examples page.

## Build Hints

From the repository root:

```powershell
dotnet run --project .\ChartForgeX.Examples\ChartForgeX.Examples.csproj -c Release
```

Topology-only examples:

```powershell
dotnet run --project .\ChartForgeX.Examples\ChartForgeX.Examples.csproj -c Release -- --topology-only
```

Website build:

```powershell
powerforge-web pipeline --config .\Website\pipeline.json --mode dev
```
